news_bbc.title: EasyJet says US bidder trying to buy it 'on the cheap' as it rejects £4.7bn offer
news_bbc.summary: The airline describes the latest bid approach from Castlelake as "highly opportunistic".

news_bbc.title: Fake romance to missed deliveries: How to protect yourself from three common scams
news_bbc.summary: Romance and investment fraud is at record levels but what can you do to prevent being caught out.

news_bbc.title: South East Water appoints new chief executive
news_bbc.summary: John Halsall has previously worked for Thames Water, South West Water and Network Rail.

news_bbc.title: Toy Story 5 scores record opening weekend for franchise
news_bbc.summary: The film's opening is a return to form for Disney and Pixar after facing notable challenges in recent years.

news_bbc.title: 'I couldn't sleep when I heard the last bank would close'
news_bbc.summary: When 84-year-old Maggie Dodd discovered that the last remaining bank in Lochgilphead was closing, she began to panic.

news_bbc.title: Is Germany looking again at coal-powered electricity?
news_bbc.summary: It had planned to abandon the fuel, but the higher cost of natural gas may make it think again.

news_bbc.title: Wowcher sorry for 'unacceptable' crocodile attack email
news_bbc.summary: The firm's marketing email appeared to reference an incident involving a toddler at a zoo.

news_bbc.title: Fuel sales halted in occupied Crimea as Ukraine targets oil facilities
news_bbc.summary: Fuel had already been rationed due to shortages caused by Kyiv's attacks against supply routes in Russian-occupied territories.
